title: Anshul Mathew Khoury Story - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
text:
Anshul Mathew Khoury Story - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
All Khoury Stories
Meet Anshul Mathew
MSCS Student
MS in Computer Science ’22
Oakland Campus
For Anshul Mathew, proximity to industry is key. While pursuing his master’s degree at Khoury College’s Oakland campus, he’s taken advantage of the vibrant tech scene in the Bay Area to make new connections and advance his career.
I believe in the power of proximity. … There are a lot of conferences that happen in San Francisco. … I met people who … can actually help me get ahead in my career. … I feel I’m blessed being here
Anshul Mathew, MSCS ’22
Explore all Khoury stories
